title: Sales Executive
description:
About the Company

Casa Creation is the authorized distributor for SK Magic, one of the world’s most advanced home appliance makers originating from Korea. Combining sleek design, effortless use, and amazing health benefits, we believe that our SK Magic product range - particularly state of the art water and air purifiers - are the fast-rising appliances of the future in today’s hectic yet discerning society.

Vision

Creating a clean and safe living environment, through the pursuit of fundamental health care

Core Values

  1. Health: We believe in creating a clean and safe environment, through the pursuit of fundamental
    health care
  2. Eco-Friendliness: Our products reduce resource consumption, minimise pollution and reduces the production-use-disposal process.
  3. Convenience: We aim to minimise labour for all our customers, creating a seamless experience and curating our products to suit each of your needs.

Responsibilities

  • Provide quality sales and consultation services for company’s range of homeware products
  • Sell and arrange for delivery, installation, and after sales services, undertaking relevant related tasks along the sales cycle for products.
  • Build strong rapport relationships with customers.

Skills Required

  • Minimum GCE ‘N’ Level
  • Possess a valid Class 3/3A driving license

Other Requirements

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a focus on being sales and customer service orientated
  • Able to work on weekends and public holidays

postedCompany.description:
Casa Creation is the authorized distributor for SK Magic, one of the world’s most advanced home appliance makers originating from Korea. Combining sleek design, effortless use and amazing health benefits, we believe that our SK Magic product range - particularly state of the art water and air purifiers - are the fast-rising appliances of the future in today’s hectic yet discerning society.


As a diversified subsidiary of the Car Choice Group – one of Singapore’s largest full-suite car dealerships – we are proud of our lineage and impressive track record of providing exceptional products and services, backed with top-tier awards including the prestigious Singapore Excellent Service Award, SGCarMart Premium Dealer of the Year and Association of Trade and Commerce’s Entrepreneur 100 for two consecutive years.


We are a young and dynamic team looking to expand with energetic homegrown talent: it’s a bonus if you vibe Korean designs! In line with the staff-centered philosophy of our parent company, we highly value everyone’s unique contributions and promise a fulfilling career journey as we achieve our vision of being Singapore’s leading next-generation home appliance provider together.


Find out more about us: https://skmagic.sg/about-sk-magic-singapore/
postedCompany.name: CASA CREATION MARKETING PTE. LTD.
